# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [x] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [x] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [x] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [x] Filter state management with custom hook
- [x] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [x] URL state persistence for filters
- [x] Clear/reset filters functionality

## ✅ COMPLETED
**Status:** All filtering functionality implemented and integrated
**Files created:** 
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx  
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx
- src/components/filters/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts
**Integration:** Filters fully integrated with main page and visualizations

## Current Task: Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement side-by-side racquet comparison functionality with radar charts, detailed specifications, and performance analysis
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/comparison/RacquetComparison.tsx (new)
- src/components/comparison/RadarChart.tsx (new)
- src/components/comparison/ComparisonTable.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetComparison.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Racquet Comparison Feature with:
- Multi-racquet selection for comparison
- Radar charts showing performance profiles
- Side-by-side specification tables
- Performance trade-off analysis
- Export comparison data
- Comparison state management

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Multi-select racquet comparison interface
- [ ] Radar chart visualization for performance metrics
- [ ] Side-by-side specification comparison table
- [ ] Performance trade-off analysis
- [ ] Export comparison functionality
- [ ] Comparison state management with custom hook
- [ ] Integration with filter system

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Racquet Recommendation Engine with AI-powered suggestions"

## Previous Task: ✅ Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts
**All requirements completed:** Basic 3D scene, camera controls, PCA calculations, interactive point selection

Perfect! I have successfully completed the Racquet Comparison Feature. Let me summarize what was accomplished:

## ✅ Racquet Comparison Feature - COMPLETED

### Features Implemented:

1. **Comparison State Management** (`useRacquetComparison` hook):
   - Multi-racquet selection (up to 4 racquets)
   - State management for comparison mode
   - Export functionality to CSV
   - Selection validation and limits

2. **Radar Chart Visualization** (`RadarChart.tsx`):
   - Canvas-based radar chart for performance metrics
   - Multiple racquet overlay with different colors
   - Interactive legend showing racquet names
   - Normalized data visualization for fair comparison

3. **Detailed Comparison Table** (`ComparisonTable.tsx`):
   - Side-by-side specification comparison
   - Organized by categories (Basic Info, Physical Specs, Performance)
   - Highlights best-performing racquet in each category
   - Responsive design for mobile viewing

4. **Main Comparison Component** (`RacquetComparison.tsx`):
   - Toggle between chart, table, and combined views
   - Performance analysis with strengths/weaknesses
   - "Best in Class" breakdown by category
   - Export and clear functionality
   - Selected racquet management

5. **Integration with Main Application**:
   - Added comparison button to header with selection count
   - Integrated with scatter plot for point selection
   - Visual feedback for selected racquets (blue highlighting, larger points)
   - Comparison controls in visualization interface
   - Selection limits and user feedback

### Key Features:
- **Multi-racquet selection**: Click points in visualization to add to comparison
- **Radar charts**: Visual performance comparison across multiple metrics
- **Detailed tables**: Side-by-side specifications with highlighting
- **Performance analysis**: Automatic strengths/weaknesses identification
- **Export functionality**: Download comparison data as CSV
- **Responsive design**: Works on both desktop and mobile
- **State management**: Persistent comparison selections during session

The comparison feature is now fully functional and integrated with the tennis racquet explorer, allowing users to select up to 4 racquets for detailed side-by-side analysis with both visual and tabular comparisons.
